item: cylindrical clarinet body blank or tube
notes: Choose stock only after target bore ID and tooling limits are measured.
Record maker model facing and table condition before pitch tests.

item: single clarinet reeds in known strengths
notes: Test more than one strength and record strength in validation-loop.csv.

item: cork pads tape or temporary leak seals
notes: Temporary closures are acceptable for first measurements but are not final keywork.

item: calipers bore gauges tuner and leak light
notes: Measurement tools are required before any fabrication authority is claimed.
